name: aelium-dashboard-tooling
description: Root tooling para Aelium Dashboard (husky, lint-staged, commitlint). Backend y frontend son proyectos pnpm independientes en sus subcarpetas.

scripts.typecheck:all: cd backend && pnpm typecheck && cd ../frontend && pnpm typecheck
scripts.test:e2e:build: pnpm --dir backend build && pnpm --dir frontend build
scripts.test:e2e:all: pnpm run test:e2e:build && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.ci:install: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --dir backend install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --dir frontend install --frozen-lockfile
scripts.ci:backend: pnpm --dir backend exec prisma generate && pnpm --dir backend typecheck && pnpm --dir backend lint:check && pnpm --dir backend test
scripts.ci:backend:full: pnpm run ci:backend && pnpm --dir backend build
scripts.ci:frontend: pnpm --dir frontend typecheck && pnpm --dir frontend lint:check
scripts.ci:frontend:full: pnpm run ci:frontend && pnpm --dir frontend build
scripts.ci:check: pnpm run ci:backend && pnpm run ci:frontend
scripts.ci:check:full: pnpm run ci:backend:full && pnpm run ci:frontend:full
